calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For A Default Prove-Up Hearing In Department 514
Off Calendar Dec-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Cheolho Lee, a/k/a Cheolho C. Lee.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana Robles, CSR #14212. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

John Wiley, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Man J. Kim, who was placed under oath and testified.
Hazel Zhang, plaintiff's Bookkeeper, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Cheolho Lee, a/k/a Cheolho C. Lee.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Promissory Note and Common Counts was filed on June 13, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Cheolho Lee, a/k/a Cheolho C. Lee occurred on August 25, 2018 and was effectuated on September 5, 2018.
Default as to defendant Cheolho Lee, a/k/a Cheolho C. Lee was entered on November 16, 2018.
DOE defendants were dimissed today, December 19, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Man J. Kim, and against the defaulted defendant Cheolho Lee, a/k/a Cheolho C. Lee, as follows:

Damages - $22,510.77.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,350.62.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $535.00.
Total - $31,221.39.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
